message:
feat(connectors): add Kimi Code and Qwen Code agent connectors

Add two new connectors for coding agents:

- **Kimi Code (Moonshot AI)**: Parses JSONL wire.jsonl files from
  ~/.kimi/sessions/<workspace-hash>/<session-uuid>/wire.jsonl.
  Handles TurnBegin, ContentPart, and ToolCall message types with
  floating-point epoch timestamps. Reads workspace from state.json.

- **Qwen Code (Alibaba)**: Parses JSON session files from
  ~/.qwen/tmp/<project-hash>/chats/session-<timestamp>-<id>.json.
  Extracts messages with "user" and "qwen" (assistant) types.
  Reads workspace from config.json in project directory.

Both connectors are registered in KNOWN_CONNECTORS, get_connector_factories(),
canonical_connector_slug(), default_probe_roots(), and default_probe_paths_tilde().

Also fixes a pre-existing test compilation error in amp.rs where
cache_root() returns Option<PathBuf> but was passed directly to contains().

Ref: coding_agent_session_search#105

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
